### ⚠️ Contributor Notices
By submitting this PR, please be aware of our [Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md):

* **CLA Required:** You must sign the [Kubernetes CLA](https://git.k8s.io/community/CLA.md) before your PR can be reviewed.
* **AI Code Reviews:** We use Copilot for initial reviews. **Do NOT click "Commit suggestion" in the GitHub UI**, as Copilot cannot sign the CLA and will block your PR. Please apply suggestions locally instead.
* **PR Takeovers:** To speed up delivery, maintainers may push final changes and directly merge your PR if it is close to completion.
* **Stale Policy:** PRs inactive for 30 days are automatically marked stale and closed 15 days later.
